content.problemStatement:
In this task, you are required to create a program that prints a motivational message with blank lines for better readability. You will use the newline character (`\n`) within the `print()` function to insert these blank lines directly, making your output more organized.

You should format your output as follows:
content.outputFormat:
`Learn, Code, Repeat.

Keep practicing every day!
`Feel free to adjust the message or the placement of the blank lines to enhance its readability!

sampleTestCases.output:
Learn, Code, Repeat.

Keep practicing every day!

hidden.expectedOutput:
Learn, Code, Repeat.

Keep practicing every day!
